title: athanasia maritima
intro: Athanasia maritima, also known as Sea Pinks or Thrift, is a low-growing, flowering plant that thrives in coastal areas and is a member of the carnation family. The medicinal properties of Athanasia maritima lie in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and other minor health issues. The health benefits of Athanasia maritima include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Athanasia maritima can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
